title: Closed-Loop CNC Pen Plotter
description: Two-axis CoreXY pen plotter driven by NEMA17 stepper motors with AS5600 magnetic encoders providing closed-loop position feedback. An Arduino Mega runs a simplified G-code interpreter; each axis has an A4988 driver plus AS5600 to detect and correct missed steps. An SG90 servo lifts and lowers the pen.
objective: Plot A4 paper (210×297 mm) with ≤ 0.3 mm positional accuracy; maximum speed 60 mm/s; closed-loop stall recovery; G-code input via USB serial; pen lift via servo.
constraints: 12 V DC stepper supply; 5 V servo and logic; NEMA17 1.8°/step at 1/16 microstepping = 0.1125°/step; ≤ £50 BOM; CoreXY belt-drive frame.
supporting_fact_titles: Stepper Motor Closed-Loop Control via Magnetic Encoder Feedback
Stepper Motor Drive — Full Step and Microstepping
design_element_titles: Closed-Loop Stepper Motor with AS5600 Magnetic Encoder

element_usage_notes.Closed-Loop Stepper Motor with AS5600 Ma: Two AS5600 modules on each NEMA17 shaft (I²C multiplexed via TCA9548A channels 0 and 1); stall threshold 8 counts (0.7°); catch-up steps fired in 1 kHz ISR.
element_usage_notes.CoreXY Belt-Drive Gantry Architecture: 2020 aluminium extrusion frame 400 mm × 400 mm; GT2 belt, 20-tooth pulley; 80 steps/mm at 1/16 microstepping on A4988.
element_usage_notes.GRBL G-code CNC Firmware Controller: Modified GRBL 1.1h (Mega2560 port); serial baud 115200; planning buffer 32 segments; feedrate 60 mm/s max; Z-axis replaced with servo pen-lift.
element_usage_notes.NEMA17 Stepper + DRV8825 Microstepping D: Two A4988 drivers (1/16 microstepping); ENABLE shared; DIR/STEP per axis; VREF trimmed to 0.6 V for 1.2 A motor current.
element_usage_notes.RC Servo Joint Actuator: SG90 on GRBL Z-axis output (D11 PWM); pen-up = 90°, pen-down = 45°; Z command in G-code triggers servo.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Mega 2560 MCU Platform: Mega 2560; GRBL on UART0 (USB); AS5600 I²C on Wire (A4/A5) + TCA9548A; closed-loop ISR on Timer2 (1 kHz).

element_interactions.from: Closed-Loop Stepper Motor with AS5600 Magnetic Encoder
element_interactions.data: encoder_angle_x (0–4095), encoder_angle_y (0–4095) via I²C TCA9548A at 1 kHz
element_interactions.description: Timer2 ISR reads both AS5600 angles via TCA9548A mux. Computes error per axis vs GRBL commanded position. Correction steps injected into GRBL step buffer. Stall declared if |error| > 8 counts for > 200 ms.

element_interactions.data: STEP/DIR pulses on D2/D3 (X) and D4/D5 (Y) at up to 30 kHz
element_interactions.description: GRBL generates step pulses via Timer1 interrupt. Closed-loop ISR watches actual vs commanded position and may inject additional steps.

element_interactions.data: PWM on D11 (GRBL Z-axis mapped to servo angle via spindle override)
element_interactions.description: G-code Z+1 → pen up (90°); G-code Z-1 → pen down (45°). Servo move followed by 100 ms dwell to allow pen contact.
